name: BNB PLUS CORP.
business: BNB Plus Corp. is a digital asset treasury company that has adopted BNB, the native cryptocurrency of the Binance blockchain, as its primary reserve asset, seeking to strategically accumulate BNB and produce yield via staking and DeFi opportunities. Through its LineaRx subsidiary, it commercializes proprietary nucleic acid production solutions for cell-free manufacturing of DNA and RNA used in advanced biotherapeutics and diagnostics.

exposures.sentence: Through LineaRx our 98% owned subsidiary, we are developing and commercializing our LineaDNA and Linea IVT platforms for the manufacture of synthetic DNA and associated enzymes for use in the production of nucleic acid-based therapeutics (the Therapeutic DNA Production Services).
Our nucleic acid production solutions enable cell-free manufacturing of deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) and ribonucleic acid (RNA), which are essential components for ... diagnostic applications.

Our current strategy is to primarily focus our resources on our BNB-focused DAT strategy wherein we manage digital assets, primarily in the native cryptocurrency of the Binance Coin blockchain commonly referred to as BNB, including staking, restaking, and liquid staking of BNB, and participation in other unique Binance ecosystem and DeFi yield opportunities to contribute the BNB to the Company's treasury operations (together, the BNB Strategy).

catalysts.sentence: On October 3, 2025, the Company closed on the Cash Private Placement (as defined below) and on October 23, 2025 completed the Cryptocurrency Private Placement (as defined below) in which the Company...

catalysts.event: Stockholder Approval obtained for Cryptocurrency Pre-Funded Warrants and Series E-2 Warrants
catalysts.sentence: Stockholder Approval was obtained on December 12, 2025.

catalysts.event: Entry into At The Market Offering Agreement
catalysts.sentence: On November 4, 2025 the Company entered into an At The Market Offering Agreement (the ATM Agreement) with Lucid Capital Markets, LLC, as sales agent (the Agent), pursuant to which we may, from time to time, offer and sell shares of our common stock, with an aggregate offering price of up to $8,157,932 through the Agent.
